children.text: Notifications when you arrive at the booked hotel and individual offers and services via push messages.
For more information, contact us via sales@hrs.de
Request My HRS password to use credit card details for future bookings.

HRS analyses usage of the app to determine the correct content requirement and improve the offer. Pseudonyms and anonymous information about usage is gathered for this purpose and sent to HRS. You can terminate capture and transmission by cancelling the selection.
